_readme: This file drives the ENTIRE portfolio. Edit any field and redeploy — all sections auto-update. Add new projects to the 'projects' array with the same schema to get them rendered instantly.

meta.name: Ankit Sengupta
typedPhrases: AI Engineer — RAG Pipelines & AI Agents
VIT Amaravati · CS AI&ML · Class of 2028

projects.title: Smart Vision Aid
projects.subtitle: AI-powered assistive smart glasses — real-time 360° spatial awareness for the visually impaired
projects.description: An end-to-end embedded AI system giving visually impaired users real-time 360° spatial awareness. Three ESP32-CAM modules feed live video into a YOLO object detection pipeline. Ultrasonic sensors provide proximity data. The Android companion app converts all detections into instant audio alerts and turn-by-turn navigation guidance. All firmware runs in C++ for microsecond-level response.

highlights.title: Vision System
highlights.detail: 3× ESP32-CAM OV2640 modules + HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensors providing full 360° overlapping spatial coverage

highlights.title: AI Detection
highlights.detail: YOLOv5/v8 real-time object detection; identifies obstacles, people & hazards with precise bounding box coordinates

highlights.title: Android Companion
highlights.detail: Receives live Wi-Fi detection data, delivers contextual audio alerts & navigation feedback via TTS engine

highlights.title: Embedded Core
highlights.detail: Interrupt-driven C++ on Arduino IDE; sensor fusion pipeline with <50ms end-to-end latency

highlights.title: Achievement
highlights.detail: Selected for VIT Amaravati Internal Expo 2025 as a standout assistive technology innovation

projects.title: Smart Agriculture Assistant
projects.subtitle: AI-powered crop analysis & farmer–buyer marketplace
projects.description: Full-stack platform using TensorFlow for crop yield prediction and OpenCV for real-time crop disease detection. A Django/Flask marketplace connects farmers directly with buyers, with ML-driven pricing recommendations and an intelligent supply-demand engine.

highlights.title: ML Pipeline
highlights.detail: TensorFlow model trained on crop dataset; Pandas for data preprocessing, feature engineering and yield trend analysis

highlights.title: Computer Vision
highlights.detail: OpenCV disease detection pipeline with confidence scoring; identifies blight, rust, and fungal infections from photos

highlights.title: Backend Marketplace
highlights.detail: Django/Flask REST API connecting farmers with buyers; order management, inventory tracking, and ML-driven pricing logic

projects.title: Smart Budget Manager
projects.subtitle: Zero-effort SMS-based expense tracking for Android
projects.description: Native Android app that passively reads bank transaction SMS and auto-categorises spending. Real-time dashboard with visual charts, Firebase-secured cloud sync, and encrypted local backup — no manual entry needed. Supports all major Indian banks.

highlights.title: SMS Engine
highlights.detail: Android BroadcastReceiver captures bank messages; regex + NLP extracts amount, merchant, category automatically

highlights.title: Dashboard
highlights.detail: MPAndroidChart visualisations; monthly summaries, category breakdowns, spend trend graphs and financial insights

highlights.title: Security
highlights.detail: Firebase Auth, encrypted Firestore storage, biometric lock, local Room DB cache for full offline access

projects.title: AI Mental Health Chatbot + OCR
projects.subtitle: Sentiment analysis · Medical report parsing · Health intelligence
projects.description: Dual-intelligence system: a TensorFlow NLP chatbot detecting emotional state in real time, paired with a Pytesseract OCR pipeline extracting structured data from medical reports and cross-referencing curated health datasets for personalised guidance.

highlights.title: NLP Engine
highlights.detail: TensorFlow LSTM classifies emotional states (anxiety, depression, neutral) with 87%+ accuracy in real time

highlights.title: OCR Pipeline
highlights.detail: Pytesseract extracts and structures text from lab reports; Pandas normalises and stores data for cross-referencing

highlights.title: Health Intelligence
highlights.detail: Cross-references user health data with curated medical datasets for personalised actionable health recommendations

projects.title: Echo — Personal AI Health Assistant
projects.subtitle: Fuzzy symptom matching · Medication guide · Diet recommendations
projects.description: Desktop AI health companion using fuzzy string matching to map user-described symptoms to known conditions in a 5,000+ entry medical CSV dataset. Provides medication guidance and personalised dietary recommendations via a clean Tkinter GUI.

highlights.title: Fuzzy Matching
highlights.detail: FuzzyWuzzy token-sort ratio maps typed symptoms (even with typos) to 5,000+ medical conditions in the dataset

highlights.title: Health Tracking
highlights.detail: Logs symptoms, medications, dietary recommendations; tracks full history across sessions with CSV persistence

highlights.title: Desktop UI
highlights.detail: Clean multi-tab Tkinter GUI with real-time search, history view, and exportable health session reports

building.title: Autonomous AI Agent Systems
building.desc: Self-directed agents with multi-step reasoning, tool use, memory, and autonomous decision-making. Exploring LangChain, LangGraph, and custom orchestration frameworks for complex real-world automation.

building.title: Production RAG Pipelines
building.desc: End-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems with vector databases (FAISS / Chroma / Pinecone), semantic chunking, hybrid search, and context-aware LLM response generation.

building.title: Scalable Backend Architectures
building.desc: High-performance async APIs with FastAPI and Django, focusing on horizontal scalability, Celery task queues, Redis caching, and clean microservices patterns deployable on cloud infrastructure.

building.title: Intelligent Automation & Workflows
building.desc: LLM-powered workflow orchestration — combining AI reasoning with programmatic control flows, API integrations, and event-driven automation to handle complex multi-step business processes.
